heading: Step 3: Create the  index.
body:
- Click the Indexes tab, then select Search Indexes.

- Click Create Atlas Search Index to open the index creation dialog box.

- Specify a name for the index.

  Your MongoDB Search index is named `default` by default. If you keep this name, then your index will be the
  default Search index for any MongoDB Search query that does not specify a different `index` option in
  its [operators](fts-operators). If you are creating multiple indexes, we recommend
  that you maintain a consistent, descriptive naming convention across your indexes.

- Specify the JSON (Javascript Object Notation) MongoDB Search index definition.

  ```json
  {
    "mappings": {
      "dynamic": true
    },
    "synonyms": [
      {
        "analyzer": "lucene.standard",
        "name": "my_synonyms",
        "source": {
          "collection": "synonymous_terms"
        }
      }
    ]
  }
  ```

- Click Create Search Index.

To learn how to add a collection that configures words as synonyms to your cluster, and use this collection to
create a MongoDB Search index and run MongoDB Search queries using synonyms, see [How to Use Synonyms with MongoDB Search](synonyms-tutorial).

To see examples of `text` queries that use synonyms, see [Synonyms Examples](text-ref-synonyms-eg) in the [text](text-ref) reference page.

To see an example `phrase` queries that uses synonyms, see [Synonyms Example](fts-phrase-synonyms-example) in the [Phrase](phrase-ref) reference page.

The following examples for the `sample_mflix.movies` collection create
index definitions that use [dynamic mappings](static-dynamic-mappings). These examples use the `synonymous_terms`
synonym source collection described in the [Synonym Source Collection Example](sample-synonyms-coll)
section to enable synonym mappings.

This example performs the following actions:

- Configures an index with a single text field and a single
  synonym mapping definition that uses the mapping configured in
  the `synonymous_terms` collection.

- Analyzes the `plot` field with the `lucene.english`
  analyzer.

- Enables synonyms from the `synonymous_terms` collection for queries
  on fields analyzed with the `lucene.english` analyzer.
